---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new feature or improvement for the project"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""

---

### Summary
Briefly describe the feature or improvement you want.

### Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

### Proposed Solution
Explain how you think this feature could be implemented or how it would work.

### Alternatives Considered
If applicable, describe any alternative solutions you considered.

### Additional Context
Add any other information, mockups, or examples that could help us understand your request.
